scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp src/theme.css src/primitives/primitives.css src/flowline/flowline.css dist/
scripts.test: pnpm run test:tokens && pnpm run test:primitives && pnpm run test:flowline
scripts.test:flowline: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/require-flowline.mjs && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/flowline/stage-flowline.test.tsx
scripts.test:primitives: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/require-primitives.mjs && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/primitives/primitives.test.tsx
